
# FourierVisual Visualize Fourier transformations
*An educational tool to understand fourier transforms better*
*The tool helps to visualize images in svg format using the
**artists** generated by fourier transformation*

*Some primitive functions and scripts are available in dev/legacy/ directory.* 
## Acknowledgments
- **Inspired by:** [Grand Anderson (3B1B)](https://www.youtube.com/results?search_query=3b1b+fourier+transform)
- **Inspired by:** [SmarterEveryDay](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=ds0cmAV-Yek&t=32s)

## Status
- A working API is ready
- Example svg files inside *data/example_svg_files* directory
- Example output videos inside *data/videos* directory
- An example script to use the API is in *example* directory

### *Future Works*
- Inset for animation
- sort the animating vectors
- Increase computational efficiency
- Cythonize
